name: Apple Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 to 6 cups sliced apples (Granny Smiths are recommended)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 12-cup tube or bundt pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, combine cinnamon and sugar; set aside 1 tablespoon. Toss the prepared apples with the remaining cinnamon-sugar mixture.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, applesauce, vanilla, orange juice, salt, and egg equivalents until well combined.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and nutmeg.
6. Fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just combined.
7. Pour more than one-third of the batter into the prepared pan. Cover with half of the apple mixture.
8. Spoon in the remaining batter and apple slices.
9. Sprinkle the reserved cinnamon-sugar mixture lightly on top.
10. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before inverting onto a plate to serve.
